summary: The user is experimenting with unconventional potato salad recipes and has recently made a successful version for a backyard barbecue. They are also exploring smoking meats, having purchased a smoker, and are particularly interested in smoking chicken, for which they seek tips and advice.
facts: The user made a potato salad with diced onions, hard-boiled eggs, and pickles for a backyard barbecue party at their friend Alex's house. The user recently attended a BBQ festival in the city with over 20 different BBQ vendors. The user has purchased a smoker and is excited to experiment with different types of wood and meats. The user plans to start smoking chicken breasts or thighs and is aware that smoking chicken can be tricky. The user has developed their own BBQ sauce recipe that has a balance of sweet, tangy, and spicy flavors. The user uses their BBQ sauce on various dishes, including grilled chicken and scrambled eggs. The user is considering using their BBQ sauce as a finishing sauce during the last 15-30 minutes of smoking chicken. The user is interested in experimenting with different BBQ styles and has been on a BBQ kick lately.
